summary: Good recording that captures a solid show with a memorable Man Smart (Woman Smarter)/Iko Iko moment, though the performance isn’t considered a top‑tier Dead concert.
review: The tape is praised for its clear capture and competent crew work, making it pleasant background music for a sunny drive or a Mother’s Day listen. The show itself is viewed as decent – not among the year’s best – but highlighted by an unusual Iko Iko diversion in the middle of “Man Smart (Woman Smarter)”. Overall listeners find it enjoyable enough to recommend despite its average set.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality averages around 3.7/5 (solid but not spectacular) while recording quality is rated about 4.5/5; weighted combination yields ~3.9 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note the crew “knew their stuff,” describing the sound as crisp and suitable for casual listening; no major flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Generally regarded as a pleasant, sunny‑day set that flows well but isn’t among the year’s standout performances.
